message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
class Sensor {
    <<C>>
    TypesOfSensors: List<string>
    TypesOfSignal: List<string>
    TypeOfSensor: string
    TypeOfSignal: string
    Component(id int, name string, date DateTime, string typeOfSensor, string typeOfSignal)
    GetFunction()
}

class Actuator {
    <<C>>
    TypesOfActuators: List<string>
    StatusesOfActuators: List<string>
    TypeOfActuator: string
    StatusOfActuator: string
    Component(id int, name string, date DateTime, string typeOfActuator, string statusOfActuator)
    GetFunction()
}

class Component {
    <<C>>
    id: int
    name: string
    date: DateTime
    Component(id int, name string, date DateTime)
    GetFunction()
}

class Program {
    <<C>>
    Main(args[] string)
}

class IComponent {
    <<C>>
    GetComponent(id int) Component
}

class Proxy {
    <<C>>
    components: List<Component>
    componentStore: ComponentStore
    Proxy()
    GetComponent(id int) Component
}

class ComponentStore {
    <<C>>
    container: ComponentContext
    ComponentStore()
    GetComponent(id int) Component
}

class ComponentContext {
    <<C>>
    Components: List<Component>
    ComponentContext()
}

Sensor --|> Component : extends
Actuator --|> Component : extends
Program *-- Proxy : uses
Proxy ..> IComponent : implements
Proxy --> ComponentStore : uses
ComponentStore --o ComponentContext : aggregates
ComponentContext o-- Component : contains
@enduml
```
